---
title: Comprehensive analysis of the carbon impacts of vehicle intelligent speed control
date: '2010-01-01'
author:
- D.C. Carslaw
- P.S. Goodman
- F.C.H. Lai
- O.M.J. Carsten
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Atmospheric Environment*'
---

## Comprehensive analysis of the carbon impacts of vehicle intelligent speed control

<p class="pub-meta">D.C. Carslaw, P.S. Goodman, F.C.H. Lai, O.M.J. Carsten</p>

_*Atmospheric Environment*_, 2010


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2010.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
